video.title: The Kid Who Took Over Twitter
video.global_style_suffix: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless matte humanoid mannequin figures with no facial features, stylized 3d reconstruction environment, dark low-key lighting, deep shadows, one red rim-light accent, desaturated cinematic documentary grade, filmic grain
video.global_negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, detailed human faces, facial features, oversaturated, neon colors, bright cheerful lighting, watermark, readable text, gibberish letters, low quality, deformed

character_bible.name: The Hacker
character_bible.description: faceless matte grey humanoid mannequin, no facial features, slim, teenage build, plain form, lit by monitor glow with a red rim light
character_bible.palette: matte grey, monitor blue, blood red accent

scenes.narration: It's the 15th of July, 2020. Just after four in the afternoon in Tampa, Florida.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless matte mannequin figure sitting alone at a desk in a dim suburban bedroom, glow of a single monitor, blinds drawn, red rim light
scenes.camera: slow push-in on, shallow focus, deliberate zoom

scenes.narration: A seventeen year old is about to take over the most powerful accounts on the internet.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on the mannequin's hands resting on a keyboard, monitor glow, dark room, red accent light

scenes.narration: At 20:17 UTC, Elon Musk's Twitter account posts a message.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, a smartphone lying on a dark desk, bright screen showing an abstract social media post, no readable text, dark surround

scenes.narration: It promises to double any bitcoin sent to an address below.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, dark map visualization, glowing red transaction lines spreading across a black world map, top-down
scenes.camera: slow lateral pan across, steady tracking

scenes.narration: Then Barack Obama's account posts it. Then Joe Biden's. Then Jeff Bezos and Bill Gates.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, grid of glowing screens in a dark room, each showing an abstract blue social feed, no readable text

scenes.narration: Apple posts it. Uber posts it.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless mannequin figures in an office lit only by monitors, all looking at their screens, dark, red accent

scenes.narration: Within minutes, the scam collects more than one hundred thousand dollars.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on a cluster of stacked coins on a dark surface, single red rim light, deep shadow

scenes.narration: Twitter's answer is drastic. It silences almost every verified account on the platform.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, dark server room corridor, rows of blinking racks, red emergency lighting, empty, nobody around
scenes.camera: slow aerial push-in toward, cinematic drone shot

scenes.narration: For a few hours, the loudest voices on Earth cannot speak.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, wide shot of a dark empty press podium with microphones, single spotlight, nobody around

scenes.narration: Here is how a teenager did it.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless mannequin figure standing alone in a doorway of a dark room, backlit, red rim light

scenes.narration: His name is Graham Ivan Clark. He is a high school student in Hillsborough County.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless matte mannequin figure standing in a suburban american street at dusk, ordinary houses, dark low-key lighting

scenes.narration: He is not a prodigy in the movie sense. He is patient, and he is good on the phone.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on a mannequin hand holding a phone to where an ear would be, dark room, red accent

scenes.narration: A year earlier, at sixteen, he had already stolen a hundred and sixty four bitcoin from a Seattle investor.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, dark desk with a laptop and scattered paperwork, single lamp, nobody around, deep shadows

scenes.narration: He did it with a SIM swap. He convinced a phone carrier that he was someone else.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on a small sim card held in mannequin fingers, extreme shallow focus, red rim light, black background

scenes.narration: That is the whole trick, in every story that follows. He does not break the machine. He talks to the people who run it.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless mannequin figure facing away, standing before a wall of dim monitors, dark, red accent

scenes.narration: The Twitter attack begins on the 15th of July with phone calls.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, vintage desk phone on a dark surface, single hard light, deep shadow, nobody around

scenes.narration: Clark and two others scrape LinkedIn for Twitter employees who might hold administrative access.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, abstract network of glowing hexagonal nodes on black, red connections forming between them

scenes.narration: Then they call them, one at a time, pretending to be Twitter's own IT help desk.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, split composition: faceless mannequin on a phone in a dark bedroom, second mannequin at an office desk, both lit by screens

scenes.narration: There is a problem with the internal VPN, the caller says. He sounds bored. He sounds like a colleague.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on a mannequin figure at an office desk holding a phone, monitor glow on featureless face, dark

scenes.narration: The employee is walked to a login page that looks exactly like Twitter's own.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, dark monitor screen showing an abstract blue login form, no readable text, reflection on glass
scenes.camera: slow push-in on, shallow focus, deliberate zoom

scenes.narration: They type in their credentials. They read out the two factor code.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on faceless mannequin fingers typing on a keyboard in the dark, red rim light

scenes.narration: On the other end of the line, in Tampa, the code is used within seconds.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless mannequin figure leaning toward a monitor in a dark bedroom, red glow, tense posture

scenes.narration: That gives them the one thing that matters. The internal tool that Twitter's own staff use to control any account.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, abstract dark interface panel glowing on a screen in a black room, geometric shapes, no readable text

scenes.narration: They start with short usernames. The kind collectors pay for. Then they aim higher.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, row of faceless mannequin figures standing in darkness, only the first one lit by a red light
scenes.camera: slow lateral pan across, steady tracking

scenes.narration: By 21:45 UTC, Twitter admits it has lost control of its own platform.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, empty modern glass office at night, chairs pushed back, monitors glowing, nobody around
scenes.camera: slow aerial push-in toward, cinematic drone shot

scenes.narration: Coinbase blocks over a thousand transactions, about two hundred and eighty thousand dollars that never reaches the scam.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, dark map visualization, glowing red money-flow lines being cut and stopping, top-down

scenes.narration: The scam itself is almost small. About a hundred and ten thousand dollars in bitcoin.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, a single small stack of coins on a vast dark empty table, one red light, deep shadow

scenes.narration: The damage is not the money. It is the proof that three people with a telephone could seize the megaphone of the planet.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, wide shot of a dark empty stadium of monitors, all showing the same abstract blue glow, nobody around

scenes.narration: And Clark leaves a trail. He always did.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on faceless mannequin figure's shoulder turning away in darkness, red rim light

scenes.narration: Investigators follow the bitcoin, and they follow the usernames he used on hacking forums.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, abstract chain of glowing red links on black, forming a path across the frame
scenes.camera: slow lateral pan across, steady tracking

scenes.narration: Some of those accounts were tied to an email address. The email was tied to a driver's license he had once uploaded to verify himself on a crypto exchange.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on an anonymous identification card lying face down on a dark desk, no readable text, single lamp

scenes.narration: The most careful social engineer in the story had verified his own identity, in writing, to a company that keeps records.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless mannequin figure sitting motionless in a dark interview room, single overhead light, empty chair opposite

scenes.narration: On the 31st of July, sixteen days after the attack, police arrest him in Tampa.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, police car parked outside a suburban house at night, red and blue light on the wall, nobody visible

scenes.narration: He is seventeen. Florida charges him as an adult, with thirty felony counts.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, empty courtroom at night, dark wood, single light over the bench, nobody around

scenes.narration: In March 2021, he takes a plea deal. Three years in prison, three years of probation, under Florida's youthful offender law.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, faceless mannequin figure standing alone in a narrow corridor, harsh overhead light, long shadow

scenes.narration: Two others were charged in the United States. We are not going to pretend the full picture is settled. Parts of it are still disputed.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, two faceless mannequin figures standing far apart in a dark empty space, dim light

scenes.narration: Twitter changed its internal tools afterwards. It says access is tighter now.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, modern glass office lobby at night, empty, cold light, security barriers, nobody around

scenes.narration: But the method he used is not a software flaw. It is a person, picking up a phone, wanting to be helpful.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, close on a desk phone under a single hard light, dark room, red accent, nobody around

scenes.narration: There is no patch for that.
scenes.image_prompt: 3d mannequin documentary, wide empty dark room with a single lit monitor, no one in the chair, red rim light
